name: Broccoli Slaw
recipeIngredient: 2 tbsp Pine nuts, toasted and chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Broccoli slaw mix, which consists of shredded broccoli stems, carrots, and red cabbage, is available packaged in many supermarkets. If you can't find it, make your own or simply substitute shredded cabbage for a more traditional slaw.
2. In a large bowl, whisk together sour cream, buttermilk, mustard, vinegar, garlic, salt, and pepper.
3. Add broccoli slaw mix and apple. Toss until coated. Sprinkle with pine nuts.
